name: 麻醉镖
description: 选择同行或同列的一个格子作为方向，向该方向发射麻醉针，被bulletPassable=false的格子拦截，命中路径上第一个敌人则施加麻醉2回合（无法移动/使用技能，受伤解除）
code: function executeSkill(context) { var caster = context.piece; var targetPos = selectTarget({ type: 'grid', range: 99, filter: 'all' }); if (!targetPos || targetPos.needsTargetSelection) return targetPos; var dx = targetPos.x - caster.x; var dy = targetPos.y - caster.y; if (dx !== 0 && dy !== 0) { return { success: false, message: '麻醉镖只能向同行或同列方向发射' }; } if (dx === 0 && dy === 0) { return { success: false, message: '不能选择自身所在格' }; } var dirX = dx === 0 ? 0 : (dx > 0 ? 1 : -1); var dirY = dy === 0 ? 0 : (dy > 0 ? 1 : -1); for (var i = 1; i <= 99; i++) { var checkX = caster.x + dirX * i; var checkY = caster.y + dirY * i; var tile = context.battle.map && context.battle.map.tiles && context.battle.map.tiles.find(function(t) { return t.x === checkX && t.y === checkY; }); if (!tile) { break; } if (tile.props && tile.props.bulletPassable === false) { break; } var enemy = context.battle.pieces.find(function(p) { return p.x === checkX && p.y === checkY && p.currentHp > 0 && p.ownerPlayerId !== caster.ownerPlayerId; }); if (enemy) { var statusId = 'sleep-' + Date.now(); addStatusEffectById(enemy.instanceId, { id: statusId, type: 'sleep', currentDuration: 2, intensity: 1, relatedRules: ['rule-sleep-prevent-move', 'rule-sleep-prevent-skill', 'rule-sleep-remove-on-damage'] }); addRuleById(enemy.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-move'); addRuleById(enemy.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-prevent-skill'); addRuleById(enemy.instanceId, 'rule-sleep-remove-on-damage'); addSkillById(enemy.instanceId, 'sleep-prevent'); addSkillById(enemy.instanceId, 'sleep-remove'); return { success: true, message: caster.name + '的麻醉镖命中' + enemy.name + '，使其进入麻醉状态2回合' }; } } return { success: true, message: '麻醉镖未命中任何敌人' }; }
previewCode: function calculatePreview(piece, skillDef) { return { description: '向同行/同列方向发射麻醉针，命中首个敌人施加麻醉2回合（不可移动不可施法，受伤解除），被掩体/墙壁拦截', expectedValues: {} }; }
